title: Ginger Biryani Tacos
description: A unique fusion of Mexican and Indian flavors, this dish combines the spices of biryani with the freshness of a taco.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chipotle peppers and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sweet corn and cook until tender.
Stir in the gouda cheese and cook until melted.
Warm tortillas according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the corn mixture onto a tortilla.
Optional: top with diced onions, cilantro, or salsa.
